This visitation center has a large park where there is a work of art called Halo, is colored glazed, then the parking lot of bicycles of typical colors of the brand, with the signage that are exclusive use of employees and then a building that on one side has the shop where all Google products are exhibited and on the other a space to eat and drink. title: Golden Gate Bridge Welcome Center - All You SHOULD Know ...
content: We stopped here on our way into SF. Very limited parking. Great views of the Golden Gate Bridge, and a few walking trails as well. Bathrooms are also available.
